capabilities.capabilityName: Multi-PGN collection, import, selection, search, ordering, and metadata
capabilities.implementationMaturity: Canonical Vue implementation with tests; legacy implementation supplies compatibility edge cases
capabilities.apiDependency: None for local import; cloud/share sources require separately confirmed repositories
capabilities.persistenceDependency: Dexie workspace/PGN categories after explicit schema gate
capabilities.securityDependency: File parsing limits and no secret-bearing source import
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Port framework-free PGN contracts and tests first; preserve canonical Vue behavior; do not copy legacy storage/UI
gaps: Target Dexie schema and migration behavior not implemented
blockers: No P0 product runtime migration authorization

capabilities.capabilityName: Self-developed SVG board, legal input, free setup, branches, and YCDW annotations
capabilities.implementationMaturity: Broad canonical Vue implementation; domain tests exist but direct rendered board test is absent
capabilities.persistenceDependency: PGN YCDW round trip plus later Dexie drafts/session
capabilities.securityDependency: Imported PGN validation; no browser credentials
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Migrate canonical domain tests and typed contracts before faithful Vue UI implementation; retain one board

capabilities.capabilityName: PGN parsing, serialization, variations, comments, NAGs, and navigation
capabilities.implementationMaturity: Canonical framework-free domain with substantial unit/integration evidence
capabilities.apiDependency: None for local PGN; external sources use adapters
capabilities.persistenceDependency: Versioned PGN/session storage after Dexie gate
capabilities.securityDependency: Validate imported text size/schema and preserve unknown annotations without executing content
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Port tests and framework-free modules as one dependency-closed slice; do not fork parser/serializer

capabilities.capabilityName: Cloud PGN browse, open, save, and save-as
capabilities.implementationMaturity: Canonical Vue feature exists; infrastructure is unsafe/unconfirmed for direct migration
capabilities.apiDependency: Cloud/share compatibility contracts are unresolved in API authority
capabilities.persistenceDependency: Cloud metadata/path drafts only after schema and privacy classification
capabilities.securityDependency: Source bearer/localStorage and token-bearing redirect behavior must not migrate
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Retain UI behavior as evidence; design typed same-origin repository before implementation
gaps: Backend contract, auth, error taxonomy, and rights/ownership not confirmed

capabilities.capabilityName: System, personal, and electronic-board chess libraries
capabilities.implementationMaturity: System/personal import is active; electronic-board UI is statically present but locked with no active request
capabilities.persistenceDependency: Imported games enter canonical PGN collection
capabilities.securityDependency: Generic proxy and browser credential paths forbidden
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Migrate import domain evidence first; keep electronic-board capability explicitly unavailable
gaps: Electronic-board capability has no active consumer/request

capabilities.capabilityName: QR and remote PGN sharing with compatibility handoff
capabilities.implementationMaturity: Publisher/handoff evidence exists; backend compatibility contract remains unresolved
capabilities.persistenceDependency: Sanitized versioned handoff with explicit TTL/invalidation
capabilities.securityDependency: No token/PII in URL; random unguessable identifiers; no value logging
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Specify typed resolver/publisher contract before implementing canonical dialog behavior
gaps: TTL, schema, invalidation, reader behavior, and backend owner unresolved

capabilities.capabilityName: Global and single-move analysis, evaluation bar, report, and PGN write-back
capabilities.implementationMaturity: Active canonical TypeScript worker-pool analysis with broad domain/store tests and Worker/CSP gaps
capabilities.persistenceDependency: Analysis results in YCDW:A and later versioned Dexie cache
capabilities.securityDependency: Worker CSP; no remote model credentials; AI disabled during ongoing games
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Port search/domain/store tests, then worker lifecycle/cancellation/stale-result protection, then faithful UI
gaps: No direct rendered analysis component test
blockers: Board asset rights gate affects image export

capabilities.capabilityName: Tournament list, groups, rounds, pairings, and game selection
capabilities.implementationMaturity: Five read paths have redacted real 200 evidence; exhaustive schemas and one round numeric constraint remain unresolved
capabilities.apiDependency: POST same-origin tournament list/groups/rounds/pairings handlers behind server HMAC
capabilities.persistenceDependency: Public selection/session category and query cache revalidation
capabilities.securityDependency: Server-only HMAC/credentials; allowlisted reads; no query strings/generic proxy
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Implement typed Zod repositories from API_AUTHORITY_MAP, then route composition and sanitized workspace handoff

capabilities.capabilityName: Finished-game replay and explicit import to analysis
capabilities.implementationMaturity: Real replay response proven for pairing id to gameid; auth/session and side-effect guarantees remain gated
capabilities.persistenceDependency: Public replay selection; explicit import creates analysis state
capabilities.securityDependency: Server injects auth; mqtt response field is not authority; no side-effect flags
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Validate real response with Zod, map to replay domain, retain read-only buffer, require explicit import

capabilities.capabilityName: Ongoing online/electronic-board live spectator and commentary
capabilities.implementationMaturity: Canonical Vue live page is unrouted; legacy spectator handler is a stub; MQTT infrastructure is unsafe/unapproved
capabilities.visualAuthoritySource: No active routed live-spectator surface confirmed
capabilities.apiDependency: Confirmed tournament discovery does not establish live transport; MQTT contract absent
capabilities.persistenceDependency: Live state must remain memory-only with non-secret selection recovery
capabilities.securityDependency: Read-only contract, server credential boundary, reconnect/snapshot model; MQTT publish forbidden
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Do not migrate implementation. Specify and approve read-only transport and recovery first.
blockers: MQTT and live transport explicitly blocked

capabilities.implementationMaturity: Active canonical Vue route exists; target contract requires same components and single-board phase-one focus
capabilities.apiDependency: Confirmed tournament/replay reads; live display requires a separately confirmed live transport
capabilities.securityDependency: No credentials/topics in URL or display state
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Reuse the same future board/player/move components with display tokens; no parallel display implementation
blockers: Live big-screen mode blocked until live contract; P0 has no product UI

capabilities.capabilityName: Offline event spectator package and resilient kiosk delivery
capabilities.implementationMaturity: Historical Windows local-server/viewer evidence only; no active fullscreen/live/offline-resilience implementation
capabilities.visualAuthoritySource: None; legacy visuals cannot override pgnViewer-new or target UI specs
capabilities.persistenceDependency: Future event snapshot, cold-start, and recovery model undefined
capabilities.securityDependency: No bundled credentials/private browser data; signed/read-only event package required
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Design a new read-only offline delivery contract; do not copy miniweb executables/build output

capabilities.capabilityName: Dedicated same-origin login, session, and logout
capabilities.implementationMaturity: Owner-confirmed contract; real production credential/session/replay/logout flow remains partial
capabilities.persistenceDependency: Opaque HttpOnly same-origin cookie; server vault; derived browser auth status only
capabilities.securityDependency: Password browser-to-server only; server hashing/signing; no upstream token/uid exposure
capabilities.migrationStrategy: Implement dedicated BFF contract only after real E2E verification; never generic proxy/login endpoint use
gaps: Login visual behavior is evidence only; referenced asset rights remain unresolved
